zach_welcome.transcript: I'm Zach. I'll teach you how real shops win while you choose the customers, equipment, people, and risks.

segments.text: I'll teach you how real shops win
while you choose the customers, equipment, people, and risks.

zach_expansion.transcript: You have outgrown the garage. Now build systems, not just parts.

segments.text: Now build systems, not just parts.

player_review_launch.transcript: I started in a garage, named my own company, and Zach helped me turn one small job into a real manufacturing business.

segments.text: and Zach helped me turn one small job into a real manufacturing business.

player_review_gameplay.transcript: I actually cut the stock, set the CNC tools, checked the G code, and inspected my first part. Every step feels connected.

segments.text: I actually cut the stock, set the CNC tools,
checked the G code, and inspected my first part.

player_review_growth.transcript: What hooked me was outgrowing the garage, hiring a team, and choosing bigger equipment until my shop became a manufacturing powerhouse.

segments.text: What hooked me was outgrowing the garage,
hiring a team, and choosing bigger equipment
until my shop became a manufacturing powerhouse.
